nodes.label: KalkMate4.png
nodes.summary: Photograph of a hand holding the KalkMate prototype PCB in a home electronics workbench. The green PCB shows a 5x5 keypad matrix of through-hole tactile switches populated on the lower portion, with surface-mount components and an OLED display module mounted at the top displaying the text 'KalkMate' in white pixels. Wires (yellow, red, black) connect from the board to a small breadboard resting on the desk. Background shows a lit Rigol digital oscilloscope displaying square waveforms on its screen, a yellow Fluke multimeter, a soldering station with sponge holder on the left, a spool of solder wire, scattered electronic components (transistors, resistors), and tools on a wooden desk surface. Warm overhead lighting from a desk lamp illuminates the scene. The photo documents the bring-up / debugging phase of the first assembled KalkMate prototype board.
